Live arrival guarantee: Most breeders include a live arrival guarantee (LAG) with overnight or 2-day shipping. Check individual seller shipping policies before ordering. Live insects are temperature-sensitive — avoid ordering during extreme heat or cold.

Buying tips

Look for captive-bred specimens to avoid wild-caught individuals. Spiderlings are plain brown and only develop adult coloration around 1-2 inches. Buy from reputable breeders who can verify the specimen hasn't been power-fed, which shortens lifespan. Juveniles are more skittish than adults, so consider your experience level when choosing age.
